relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file (salary_credits.json) records salary payments FROM Accounts TO Credit department, while the outbound file (monthly_repayment_direct_debit.json) records loan repayments FROM Credit TO Accounts department. These represent opposite transaction flows with fundamentally different purposes: salary deposits vs. loan collections. While both involve bank accounts and amounts, the semantic direction and business logic are incompatible—the outbound file does not plausibly derive from transforming the inbound file.
